name: Message Send API
summary: Backend API endpoint for sending messages to the AI agent and initiating response streaming
goals: Process incoming user messages and initiate AI agent responses
Support streaming response delivery via SSE

specDetail.description: Exposes POST /api/agents/sessions/:sessionId/messages endpoint that accepts a user message, appends it to the conversation history, and initiates an AI agent response stream.

parameters.name: images
parameters.description: Optional array of base64-encoded or URL-referenced images

constraints: Must validate message content length (1-50000 chars)
Must enqueue the message for processing and return immediately with a stream URL
Must handle rate limiting per session to prevent abuse

acceptanceCriteria.then: the message is stored and a streaming response is initiated

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
